pk_tuples.dose_original: 2 x 20 mcg EE tablets (40 mcg total)
pk_tuples.notes: Ethinyl estradiol after Treatment A (DR-103 2x20mcg EE/150mcg LNG). Cmax 85.8 pg/mL, AUC0-inf 939.2 pg*h/mL. Study DR-103-102, female subjects.

pk_tuples.dose_original: 2 x 25 mcg EE tablets (50 mcg total)

pk_tuples.dose_original: 2 x 30 mcg EE tablets (60 mcg total)
